'''Ninebeedee''' was the personal [[Droid/Legends|droid]] of [[Krynda Draay]]. It was destroyed by [[Q'Anilia]] in [[3963 BBY]].

==History==
After the death of her husband, [[Barrison Draay]], Krynda grew despondent and closed herself off from the world—neglecting her son, [[Lucien Draay|Lucien]] in the process. She left the care of Lucien to 9BD for much of his childhood, until he was old enough to be trained by her retainer [[Haazen]]

In [[3964 BBY]], Krynda suffered a stroke when she saw the [[First WatchCircle]] [[Padawan Massacre|murder]] their [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]]. [[Haazen]] put her in stasis, with all visits to her barred. Lucien tried to enter the [[Draay Estate]] before his meeting with the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] but he was refused entry into his own house from the droid.

During the events of [[Vindication]], [[Q'Anilia]] sliced off 9BD's head while trying to get into Krynda's room.
